name: SakuttoWorks-Agent-Commerce-OS-Catalog
description: The official MCP catalog for Sakutto Works Agent-Commerce-OS. Provides middleware tools for RAG pipeline integration and web data normalization.

tools.name: analyze_intent
tools.description: [Core] Parses natural language prompts to identify necessary data formatting steps.

tools.name: search_data
tools.description: [Tavily] Performs autonomous deep-web research and returns RAG-optimized markdown.

tools.name: structured_data_etl
tools.description: [Pandas] Extracts and normalizes numerical tables via Agent-Commerce-Core.

dataset_identifier.description: The target identifier for the data set to process.
